name: Lawry's Mexican Lasagne
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a large skillet until crumbly and fat is rendered.
2. Drain excess fat.
3. Add seasoned salt, taco seasoning mix, tomatoes, tomato sauce, and chilies to the skillet. Mix well.
4. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, combine ricotta cheese and eggs.
6. Spread half of the meat mixture in a 13x9-inch baking dish.
7. Top with half of the tortillas.
8. Spread half of the ricotta cheese mixture over the tortillas.
9. Cover with half of the jack cheese.
10. Repeat steps 6-9, ending with grated cheese on top.
11. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 20 to 30 minutes.
12. Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting into squares.
Makes 8 servings.
